characters.name: Adolf Hitler
characters.description: Adolf HitlerBiographical informationDate of death1908Physical descriptionSpeciesHumanGenderMaleEye colorBrownAppearancesVolume1Episode(s)Alternate HistoriesVoice ActorDieter Jansen Adolf Hitleris a character in thevolume oneLOVE DEATH + ROBOTSepisodeAlternate Histories. Hitler bursts out through the doors of the Academy of Fine Arts Vienna. In the first scenario - as he walks down the steps onto the pavement - he accidentally bumps into a Jewish boy. Hitler drops his artwork as he falls head-first onto the pavement, and it flies everywhere.

characters.name: Bala
characters.description: BalaAffiliationGalrogsBiographical informationStatusAliveAppearancesVolume4Episode(s)400 BoysVoice ActorSienna King Balais a character in thevolume fourLOVE DEATH + ROBOTSepisode400 Boys. Bala, a member of an all-woman team called the Galrogs, fought for her life daily against other teams. However, when a new aggressor appeared, dubbed the 400 Boys, giants who wiped out entire Teams in seconds, Bala and the Galrogs got authorization from their leader, Old Mother, to join the other Teams to fight the 400 Boys. The 400 Boys killed several of their members, but were ultimately defeated, with Bala personally killing one of them by cutting off the top of his head.

Bowes Bethis a character in thevolume oneLOVE DEATH + ROBOTSepisodeSuits. As Hank left, Beth called Mel.

characters.name: Bishop Cleary
characters.description: Bishop ClearyBiographical informationStatusUnknownAppearancesVolume4Episode(s)GolgothaVoice ActorGraham McTavish Bishop Clearyis a character in thevolume fourLOVE DEATH + ROBOTSepisodeGolgotha. When an alien race called The Lupo reached out to the United Nations after silently orbiting earth, they asked to speak toDonal Maguire, a priest who had witnessed Blackfin, a dolphin, coming back to life. Cleary drove Maguire down to the beach and warned him that the Church hadn't formed an opinion on the Lupo and not to screw it up. Maguire spoke to the Lupo and after their talk, Lupo spoke to Blackfin, their Messiah, who said that those who walk had slaughtered those who swim. This prompted the Lupo to start shooting down at Earth with the aim of wiping out humanity.

characters.name: Briggs
characters.description: BriggsAffiliationPop SquadBiographical informationStatusDeceasedPhysical descriptionSpeciesHumanGenderMaleEye colorBrownAppearancesVolume2Episode(s)Pop SquadVoice ActorNolan North Briggsis a character in thevolume twoLOVE DEATH + ROBOTSepisodePop Squad. Briggs is a detective working in a futuristic society. His job is to root out "breeders", the people who refuse the rejoo treatment which is the key to immortality and keeps people infertile. Breeders choose to have children, which is in this society is illegal, as since everyone can live forever, no new people are allowed to come into the world as that would cause overpopulation.

characters.name: Calis
characters.description: CalisRelativesMelis(brother)Biographical informationStatusDeceasedPhysical descriptionSpeciesHumanGenderMaleEye colorBrownAppearancesVolume3Episode(s)Bad TravellingVoice ActorAnthony Mark Barrow Calisis a character in thevolume threeLOVE DEATH + ROBOTSepisodeBad Travelling. Calis was the brother ofMelis. He was a sailor and a member of a crew whose ship got ambushed by aThanapod. Calis was injured during the attack, and the ship's captain, alongside three others, were killed. First mateTorrinultimately took control of the group, and one by one, Torrin killed them off for their cowardice and treachery.

characters.name: Christopher
characters.description: ChristopherBiographical informationStatusAlivePhysical descriptionSpeciesHumanAppearancesVolume4Episode(s)For He Can CreepVoice ActorJim Broadbent Christopheris a character in thevolume fourLOVE DEATH + ROBOTSepisodeFor He Can Creep. Christopher, a poet, was an inmate in St. Luke's Asylum. He had a fondness forJeoffry, a cat who also lived in the asylum. WhenSatancame and attacked Jeoffry, Christopher agreed to do whatever it took for Satan to spare Jeoffrey's life, which led to him agreeing to write a poem for Satan. When Satan returned to claim the poem, which contained Christopher's soul, three alley cats attacked Satan to distract him while Jeoffry creeped in to destroy the poem. Jeoffry then told Satan to leave.

characters.name: Claire Markham
characters.description: Claire MarkhamBiographical informationStatusAlivePhysical descriptionSpeciesHumanGenderFemaleEye colorBrownAppearancesVolume1Episode(s)Zima BlueVoice ActorEmma Thornett Claire Markhamis a character in thevolume oneLOVE DEATH + ROBOTSepisodeZima Blue. Reporter Claire Markham, like many others, had heard the story ofZima. That he was a man who was a painter, but he got bored of painting just people. He began painting the cosmos, and starting adding blue shapes to his murals, which got larger and larger. Zima eventually unveiled an entirely blue mural, and thus began the "Blue Period", during which Zima created blue murals of immense size, some even the area of planetoids. Zima gave himself illicit cybernetic modifications, allowing him to venture into the cosmos without the limits that a human being is tied down by.

characters.name: Coombs
characters.description: CoombsBiographical informationStatusDeceasedAppearancesVolume4Episode(s)How Zeke Got ReligionVoice ActorRoger Craig Smith Coombsis a character in thevolume fourLOVE DEATH + ROBOTSepisodeHow Zeke Got Religion. Coombs was called in to command a mission that involved bombing a church in France. The team, aside fromZeke, was wary of bombing a church, but went ahead anyway. Coombs tracked their location and asked them to wait before dropping the bombs. When they finally dropped them, they were successful in their mission, but a demon that was being summoned in the church had already been released. It attacked them and in the ensuing violence, Coombs was killed.

characters.name: Croak
characters.description: CroakAffiliationThe BrothersBiographical informationStatusAliveAppearancesVolume4Episode(s)400 Boys Croakis a character in thevolume fourLOVE DEATH + ROBOTSepisode400 Boys. Croak, a member of a Team called the Brothers, fought for his life daily against other Teams. While fighting one of these teams, the Soooooots, another brother, Slash, was cut on the face byHilo. Later, Slash and the other four remaining Brothers, found Hilo, who said he and the other Soooooots had been attacked by new aggressors, giants who wiped out everyone but Hilo. Slash invited Hilo to join them and rally all the other remaining Teams to fight against the new Team they called the 400 Boys. They went to the Galrogs, an all-woman team, and then recruited all the other remaining Teams. Then they faced the 400 Boys. Even though the 400 Boys were giants, they managed to work together to take them out, though Jade was among those killed.

Both had superior capabilities than ordinary soldiers but faced heavy discrimination, being called Dog Soldiers and treated as animals.

characters.name: Diego
characters.description: DiegoBiographical informationMarital statusRose†(wife)StatusDeceasedAppearancesVolume4Episode(s)Spider RoseVoice ActorFeodor Chin Diegois a character in thevolume fourLOVE DEATH + ROBOTSepisodeSpider Rose. Diego and his wife,Rose, then called Lydia, were living on Konis when a race of aliens called the Shapers attacked and killed Diego and nearly killed Rose. Eight years later, Rose avenged his death by killingJade.

characters.name: Donal Maguire
characters.description: Donal MaguireBiographical informationStatusUnknownAppearancesVolume4Episode(s)GolgothaVoice ActorRhys Darby Donal Maguireis a character in thevolume fourLOVE DEATH + ROBOTSepisodeGolgotha. Maguire had witnessed some dolphins killed in an oil spill. By the time they were found, they'd been dead for a few days. As Maguire watched, one of the dolphins, Blackfin, came back to life. Some time after this, The Lupo, an alien race that had been silently orbiting earth, reached out to the United Nations, asking to speak to Maguire.Bishop Clearydrove Maguire down to the beach where the meeting was to take place and told him that the Church hadn't made a formal statement about the Lupo and warned him not to screw it up. As protesters and reporters swarmed him,General Doddsappeared and led Maguire to the top of the steps that led down to the beach. He said that the Lupo appeared to have great fire power and warned him not to screw the meeting up. Maguire went down to the beach and waited as the Lupo crashed into the beach. One crawled out and asked Maguire to walk with him. As they walked, they talked about their faith and Maguire admitted to questioning his at times. The Lupo said it wouldn't be faith if he didn't question it. The Lupo then stopped and called out into the water. Blackfin surfaced and they talked. The Lupo then told Maguire the Messiah had given her gospel and had called for the destruction of humanity due to those on land killing those in the water. The Lupo then attacked, firing onto the humans on the beach. Clearly came down to the beach and asked Maguire what had happened. Maguire said he thinks they screwed up.
